data.title: A Multicenter, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Phase 3 Trial of Dextromethorphan and Bupropion Sustained-Release Tablets in Adult Patients With Major Depressive Disorder
data.brief_summary: A multicenter, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 3 trial, aim to evaluate the efficacy and safety of dextromethorphan and bupropion sustained-release tablets in Chinese adult patients with major depressive disorder.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. Male or female, Age 18 - 65, inclusive
2. Currently meets DSM-5 diagnosis of MDD without psychotic features, Current major depressive episode of at least 4 weeks in duration at screening
3. Identified as MDD by Mini-international Neuropsychiatric interview (M.I.N.I.)
4. MADRS
endpoints: Change in MADRS Total Score From Baseline to Week 6
